title: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Medicaid Recipients - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Foster Families > Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Medicaid Recipients 32 Matching Service Providers ADVANCED HEALTH COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Advanced Health is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Advanced Health Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 269-7400 Visit Website More Details ADVANCED HEALTH BAY CITIES BROKERAGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides non-emergency transportation. Transportation can be scheduled to and from covered medical appointments and for pharmacy pickups. Transportation services are intended to help when no other options are available. Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Advanced Health Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 266-4323 Visit Website More Details ALLCARE HEALTH ALLCARE HEALTH BROOKINGS OFFICE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in AllCare Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Nurse Helpline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 471-4106 Visit Website More Details ALLCARE HEALTH ALLCARE HEALTH BROOKINGS OFFICE FLEXIBLE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offeres funds in addition to the covered benefits of the Oregon Health Plan (OHP) through Coordinated Care Organizations (CCOs) to improve care delivery and overall member health and well-being. Eligibility for services is determined by the CCO. Services can include but are not limited to: -Housing support (rent assistance, rental deposit assistance [requires move-in date], utility bills, housing programs for women and children) -Temporary motel stays (For individuals being discharged from the hospital; experiencing an extreme weather event; has a set move-in date for a new home and needs a temporary place to stay before then; or actively fleeing a domestic violence situation.) -Electronics such as cellphones, computers, and other communication devices -Specific educational materials and/or classes -Family and home resources (ex. items for child health and safety, parenting programs, household appliances, climate devices) -Gym memberships and exercise classes/equipment -Health and substance use prevention support All flexible services are determined on a case-by-case basis by the CCO. HRS are NOT intended to address emergency situations. CCOs are not required to offer flexible services. As flexible services are not a covered benefit, a denial cannot be appealed, but an OHP member can submit a complaint. Eligibility: -Must be a current member of the CCO -Member must be unable to receive requested service by any other benefit or means -Item or service requested must help with medical need or life situation -All documentation requested for service must be provided Health-related services are limited, not immediate, not guaranteed or continuously available, and individuals may not qualify. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (888) 460-0185 Visit Website More Details ALLCARE HEALTH ALLCARE HEALTH MAIN OFFICE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 471-4106 Visit Website More Details ALLCARE HEALTH ALLCARE HEALTH MEDFORD OFFICE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF AllCare CCO coordinates health insurance services for Medicaid members assigned to its Coordinated Care Organization (CCO). Includes specialized information and referrals to healthcare providers for medical, dental, and behavioral health. Additional wellness benefits for AllCare CCO members include medical transportation, pain management, weight management programs, and a 24/7 nurse help line. AllCare CCO members can receive vouchers from providers for taking healthy actions such as attending appointments and tobacco cessation, to purchase items at the BABE Store such as diapers, books, and blankets. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (888) 460-0185 Visit Website More Details CAREOREGON COORDINATED HEALTH CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF CareOregon is a Managed Care Organization (MCO) that coordinates Medicaid services for Coordinated Care Organizations (CCO) Jackson Care Connect and Columbia Pacific. CareOregon also provides health insurance services through its partnering CCO, Health Share. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, substance use disorder treatment, and non-emergency transportation for health care visits covered by the CCO. Eligibility: For CCO services: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members in the Portland metro region currently assigned to Health Share-CareOregon CCO Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 416-4100 Visit Website More Details CASCADE HEALTH ALLIANCE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Cascade Health Alliance is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Health Share of Oregon; members are able to choose medical care through CareOregon, Kaiser Permanente, Legacy Health, OHSU, or Providence. Eligibility: OHP members enrolled with [name of CCO] and enrolled in OHP Plus (BMM, BMH, BMD) benefits Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm (844) 256-5720 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON CASCADES WEST COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS ALBANY OFFICE CASCADES WEST RIDE LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Coordinated transportation for traveling to and from covered non-emergency medical services. Transportation is provided for those who have no other way to get to their medical appointments. Transportation is arranged through locally contracted transportation providers. Mileage reimbursement is another option for those who are able to drive or have friends or family who can provide transportation. 1400 Queen Avenue SE Suite 201 Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Eligible Oregon Health Plan (OHP) Medicaid clients and InterCommunity Health Network Coordinated Care Organization members that have been qualified and appear in Cascades West Ride Line electronic eligibility files, and Samaritan Advantage Medical clients. Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Transport: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (541) 924-8738 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PACIFICSOURCE COMMUNITY SOLUTIONS PACIFICSOURCE COMMUNITY SOLUTIONS BEND COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF PacificSource Community Solutions is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Trillium Community Health Plan Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (877) 600-5472 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UMPQUA HEALTH ALLIANCE MEDICAL TRANSPORTATION MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a ride service for health care visits covered by Oregon Health Plan (OHP) for Umpqua Health Alliance Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) members. Eligibility: OHP members assigned to Umpqua Health Alliance Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (877) 324-8109 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COMMUNITY CARE WELLRIDE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF WellRide services are a covered Medicaid benefit for non-emergency medical transportation. Transportation can be scheduled to and from covered medical appointments, including primary care visits, specialist office visits, physical therapy, dental care visits, mental health services, and dialysis. Services include bus fare, pre-approved mileage reimbursement, wheelchair lift/ramp van, taxi cab, stretcher car for those who need to be transported lying down, and secured transport for those in a mental health crisis. If needed, personal care attendants can also ride at no cost. Transportation services are intended to help when no other options are available. Eligibility: OHP members assigned to Yamhill Community Care. Not available for people with CAWM coverage. Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm Email (844) 256-5720 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NON-EMERGENCY TRANSPORTATION FOR OHP MEMBERS NON-EMERGENCY MEDICAL TRANSPORTATION OREGON CASCADES WEST COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS CASCADES WEST RIDE LINE
